1.0.2.en: extens value options for humidifier device

1.0.7.en: Smart Plug: fix power-scale auto-detect locking on zero load; add Power Factor (DP 21) capability; add "Set countdown timer" flow action (DP 9).

1.0.9.en: Fix frozen "last updated" timestamps after reconnect; correct power scale default to ×0.1 (Tuya standard); fix auto-detect locking on zero load; remove false Power Factor (DP 21 = test_bit); add countdown timer flow action.

1.0.10.en: Dehumidifier: suppress spurious "water tank full/emptied" notifications triggered by the transient alarm pulse the device emits during reconnect — alarm now only fires if it stays active for 5 seconds

1.0.11.en: Smart plug: energy meter now works on devices where DP 17 is frozen — set Energy DP to 0 to let the app compute kWh from live power readings instead (persisted across restarts, resettable via flow action).

1.0.13.en: Smart plug: energy integration upgraded to trapezoidal averaging — averages power at the start and end of each poll interval for more accurate kWh on dynamic loads
